channel.title: NAPR Lephart, MA Bachman, W LeBar, S McClellan, K Barron, L Schroeder, DW Newton | PlatCOVID
channel.description: NAPR Lephart, MA Bachman, W LeBar, S McClellan, K Barron, L Schroeder, DW Newton

image.title: NAPR Lephart, MA Bachman, W LeBar, S McClellan, K Barron, L Schroeder, DW Newton

item.title: Comparative study of four SARS-CoV-2 Nucleic Acid Amplification Test (NAAT) platforms demonstrates that ID NOW performance is impaired substantially by patient and specimen type.
